magic_formula.reason: Needs 200+ stock universe for PE data

graham_defensive.reason: Value strategy requires large universe; strict filters protect capital

key_findings: Monthly rebalancing >> Weekly (5x fewer trades, much better signal quality)
Wider entry zones (8% above MA) capture more trends than tight zones (3%)
Letting profits run (take_profit=50%) >> early profit taking (20%)
Trailing stop ATR 2.5x provides good balance between protection and staying in trends
Multi-strategy fusion (voting) outperforms any single strategy
Value strategies (Graham, Magic Formula) need 500+ stock universe to express alpha
Weekly confirmation filter (from SwingTrendV2) can reduce false signals by ~40%
Fundamental PE/PB filter can be too aggressive for A-shares → make optional
TOP performed in stock-analyzer: ETF Sector Rotation +136% (sector momentum > stock picking)
next_steps: Expand kline data from 10 to 100+ stocks
Add ETF sector rotation strategy (proven #1 performer in stock-analyzer)
Implement weekly confirmation in Alpha Composite (reduce false signals by 40%)
Add TopKDropout mechanism (random drop 2-3 stocks to reduce overfitting)
Integrate stock-analyzer factor scores (60+ factors) into score calculation
